title: Aromatic Oil Burner，Geometric Ceramic Essential Oil Candle Holder Wax Melt Burner Warmer Melter fragrance Home Office Decoration for Home Office Bedroom Living Room Gifts-01
features: Great for mixing and matching perfumes to create your own personal aroma blends
Suitable for living room, bedroom, hotel, restaurant, office and so on
Made of iron and ceramic material, robust and durable in use, it can be used as an essential oil burner or used as candle holder for candles
Design of the geometric rack, elegant and elegant, very beautiful, a perfect home decor, which creates a romantic atmosphere for your room

With the use of essential oils: add 8 minutes full of hot water to the top groove, add a few drops of aromatherapy oil to the hot water, and mix the oil and water with proper stirring. Light the candle at the bottom and heat it to volatilize the essential oil. Drop 3-4 drops of essential oil in a small room; drop 5-6 drops in a larger room. When the water is almost dry, please add hot water in time. Don't dry it, it will burn the stove.
description: Product Description Product Description Black Iron Incense Burner Also known as essential oil burners, incense burners, smokers, etc., aromatherapy burners are one way to add fragrance to your living room. This iron incense burner has the perfect shape to be more than just an aromatherapy product, it's a craft. This traditional candle flame incense burner is vintage and classic. 2 Ceramic Aroma Diffuser Discs If you only have one aromatherapy disc, in case you accidentally break it, you will need to spend time to buy another one. To solve this problem, we offer two. Replacement discs provide both added safety and convenience for you. Wide range of uses Charming Fragrance Use your favourite fragrance, the charming aroma can make your mood soothing, refreshing, and can also purify the air. Applicable places Living room, bedroom, study, office and all your favourite places, create your favourite atmosphere and enjoy the perfect scenting experience at any time. Warm Candlelight Whether it's in the afternoon or at night, just light up the scented burner, the aroma is overflowing and the candlelight is flickering, which makes you relax immediately. Excellent quality Stainless steel process Special baking paint process, anti-rust and corrosion resistance, solid and durable, everlasting. Hand-welding Beautifully crafted and not easy to break, firmly bonded. Thicker Iron Made of thicker iron wire to ensure that it is not easy to be damaged. Smooth Bottom The bottom is flat, can be placed anywhere very stable, to avoid fire. Precautions Ensure that the surface temperature of the incense burner has dropped when you touch it with your hands to avoid burns. Keep the incense burner out of the reach of children and pets, and place it on an insulated object. After using the incense burner, the surface temperature is high, put out the tea wax to cool down before moving it. Ensure that there is enough water in the container on top of the incense burner to prevent the water from boiling over or drying out. use the recommended tea wax. To avoid fire, use when occupied.
